Being born in 2006 i never watched him live. Back when I was 12–13, my brother used to show me Nemesis performances and that’s honestly how I started discovering band music. Maher  bhai became a huge part of that phase of my life, and through my brother, I somehow became a fan too.I’ve been a fan for all these years without ever getting to see him perform live, so seeing him back now feels insanely emotional and personal to me. God bless him.
